title: Compare Or Aggregate
description: Gather independent facts, combine them, then present a comparison or aggregate answer.
when_to_use: The request asks to compare multiple items or aggregate several independent facts.
The facts can be gathered independently before synthesis.
skeleton: tool/result/summary nodes: gather or prepare independent facts
result: present the comparison or aggregate answer
adaptation_notes: Keep fan-out within the plan node budget; consolidate similar lookups when possible.
Use a result node directly if the synthesis node is already the final user answer and no extra shaping is needed.
